Home/Services/Teeth Whitening
Teeth Whitening

Teeth Whitening in Kolkata | Brighter Smile in One Visit

A brighter smile can transform your confidence. Sushmita's Dental Clinic offers professional in-office teeth whitening at our Salt Lake City (Bidhannagar) clinic that delivers dramatic, safe results far superior to over-the-counter products.

Our professional whitening uses clinically proven agents at concentrations only available to dental professionals, combined with specialised light activation technology to maximise results while protecting your gums and enamel.

Most patients see teeth whitened by 6-10 shades in a single 60-90 minute session. We also offer custom take-home whitening kits.

Key Benefits

  • Immediate, dramatic whitening results
  • Safe, professionally supervised treatment
  • Up to 6-10 shades whiter in one session
  • Protects gums and tooth enamel
  • Long-lasting results with proper maintenance
  • Take-home kits also available

Our Treatment Process

1

Pre-Whitening Checkup

Examination to ensure teeth and gums are healthy for whitening.

2

Gum Protection

Protective barrier applied to shield gums during treatment.

3

Whitening Application

Professional whitening gel applied to tooth surfaces.

4

Light Activation

Specialised light activates the whitening agent for maximum results.

5

Results & Aftercare

Review of results with personalised aftercare instructions.

Book Appointment

We confirm within 2 hours • Free first consultation

Thank you! We'll confirm your appointment shortly.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

How long do whitening results last?

Results typically last 1-3 years depending on diet and lifestyle.

Is teeth whitening safe?

Yes, when performed by dental professionals. Our supervised process is completely safe.

Will whitening work on crowns or veneers?

Whitening only works on natural teeth. We will advise you during your consultation.

How much does teeth whitening cost in Kolkata?

Very competitively priced. Book a consultation for current pricing.
